mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.avatar, u.role, u.create_time AS createTime, COUNT(m.id) AS totalMeetingCount, SUM(IF(YEARWEEK(m.create_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(NOW(), 1), 1, 0)) AS weekMeetingCount,
SUM(IFNULL(m.duration, 0)) AS totalAudioDuration, SUM(IF(YEARWEEK(m.create_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(NOW(), 1), IFNULL(m.duration, 0), 0)) AS weekAudioDuration,
SUM(IFNULL(m.asr_duration, 0) + IFNULL(m.llm_duration, 0)) AS totalAiDuration, SUM(IF(YEARWEEK(m.create_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(NOW(), 1), IFNULL(m.asr_duration, 0) + IFNULL(m.llm_duration, 0), 0)) AS weekAiDuration FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN biz_meeting m ON u.id = m.user_id
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
GROUP BY u.id
ORDER BY ${orderBy} ${isAsc ? 'ASC' : 'DESC'}
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
